examples: They laughed at my puny efforts.
As for recycling, the 9,500 tonnes of electronics, Apple says it has recycled since 1994, is puny given the amount of equipment the firm sells.
The lamb was a puny little thing.
How can such a puny manufacturing base ever aspire to close such a gaping deficit?
Now, on its very anniversary (oh cruel irony), the portfolio--all tech stocks--is up a puny 41%.
